title: Combinatronics growth — whole-system scan, surface collapse, optimal width
motto: Every file indexed — tree grows then collapses to surface until optimal compute width emerges.

methods.scan: rglob all stack roots — py json png html combinatronics facets
methods.tree: surface_collapse — merge depth N+ into parent each generation
methods.width: bench WIDTH_CANDIDATES — minimize overflow, maximize facet spread

growth.improves_steadily: surface_score rises as depth merges upward

rebalance_hook: g16-combinatronic-rebalance.py optimal — growth step before spider_wire
